title: Easy Pleat Tribute Ribbon - Waterproof Poly Ribbon - Pre-Pleated Edging for Floral Tributes, Crafts & Decoration - 10m or 30m Length, 50mm Wide (Lime Green, 50mm x 10m)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: High-quality box ribbon pleating made from waterproof polyester material, perfect for floral tributes and decorative applications
DIMENSIONS: 11 yards (10 metres) in length and 1 inch (2.5 cm) in width, providing ample material for various projects
PRE-PLEATED DESIGN: Ready-to-use pleated edging saves time and effort, ensuring consistent and professional-looking results
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for funeral flower arrangements, wedding decorations, craft projects, and general floral design work
EASY APPLICATION: Quick and simple to attach, making it an efficient solution for finishing floral designs with an elegant touch
description: Elevate your floral designs and craft projects with this Easy Pleat Tribute Ribbon. This high-quality, pre-pleated waterproof poly ribbon is designed for effortless application, saving you valuable time and ensuring a professional finish every time. Perfect for enhancing floral funeral tributes, creating stunning gift wrapping, or adding elegant edging to various DIY projects. Key Features: Professionally Pre-Pleated: No need for tedious hand-pleating! Our easy pleat ribbon comes meticulously pleated and ready to use, providing a consistent and beautiful ruffle effect. Waterproof Poly Material: Crafted from durable, waterproof poly ribbon, this edging is ideal for outdoor use and ensures your creations remain pristine, even in damp conditions. Two Size Options: Choose the length that best suits your needs. Available in a 10-meter (32-foot) roll or a larger 30-meter (98-foot) roll, both with a practical 50mm (approx. 2 inches) width. Efficient Coverage: A single 10m length is typically sufficient to edge approximately 7 to 9 standard funeral letters, while the 30m roll offers greater value for larger projects or frequent use. Versatile Applications: While perfect as a tribute ribbon for funeral designs, it is also fantastic for event decoration, costume embellishment, gift baskets, scrapbooking, and other creative crafts. Vibrant Color Range: Available in a spectrum of beautiful colors (select your preferred color from the options). Product Specifications: Material: Poly Ribbon Length: 10 meters (32 feet) OR 30 meters (98 feet) - Select from options Width: 50mm (approx. 2 inches) Style: Pre-pleated / Easy Pleat Features: Waterproof, Ruffle Trim, Edging Ribbon Ideal for: Floral Tributes, Funeral Letters, Crafts, DIY Decoration, Gift Wrapping Choose your required color and length, then Add to Basket to experience the ease and elegance of this Easy Pleat Tribute Ribbon!
